branch.branch_summary: Implement TASK-074 evidence-independence-audit: a safe_read verifier that classifies evidence independence and fails when release-signoff evidence is only maker-authored or self-attested. Verification gate: low-independence fixture must fail plus unit tests and command help metadata. Stop condition: audit-only scope; do not integrate into release-state-audit until TASK-075. QIF boundary: audit pass is structural/runtime evidence of evidence independence, not proof of semantic truth.

tree_answer.where_are_we: TASK-074 sits on v6.7 after shipped v6.6.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Advance v6.7 Verifiable Governance: make missing archmap impact dispositions, self-attested review provenance, and low-independence evidence machine-detectable so release sign-off can fail on structural self-attestation instead of trusting maker claims.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Start TASK-074: v6.7 frontier: evidence independence audit
